title: THE HOLE
description: THE HOLE is an experimental Minecraft mod that introduces coordinate-based black holes. Place black holes in your world that will attract nearby entities, items, and ultimately blocks, creating destructive zones.
body:
THE HOLE is an experimental Minecraft mod that introduces coordinate-based black holes. Place black holes in your world that will attract nearby entities, items, and ultimately blocks, creating destructive zones.

FEATURES:
Coordinate system
Growth system
Automatic removal
Player notification
Toggle command
World protection

COMMANDS:
/thehole create [x] [y] [z]: Create a black hole at the specified coordinates
/thehole create: Create a black hole at your current location
/thehole remove: Remove the nearest black hole
/thehole savemode: Enable/disable safe mode

!IMPORTANT WARNINGS!
-Performance reduction
-High computational load: Black holes continuously scan large areas for entities and blocks
-Resource intensive: Large black holes (radius > 30) can significantly impact frame rate
-CPU load: Complex physics calculations are performed for each active black hole.
-Irreversible destruction: Absorbed blocks are permanently removed from the world
-Large-scale damage: Black holes can destroy entire structures and landscapes
-Potential damage: Extremely large black holes may cause chunk loading issues

SAFE MODE
Safe mode prevents black holes from growing beyond a radius of 80

KNOWN ISSUES
-Very large black holes may cause significant lag spikes during growth phases
-The speed of object absorption varies depending on server performance

NOTE: This mod is intended for experimental gameplay. Use it responsibly and consider the impact on your system's performance. The author is not responsible for equipment damage or world damage resulting from unsafe use.
